ValidationRule.description: Ensure that the selected Seller Type and the lookup entered match. For example, if seller type is Airline
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) == 'Acquisition' , OR(ISBLANK(TEXT(leaseworks__Seller_Type__c)), CASE(leaseworks__Seller_Type__c,
"Lessor", IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lessor__c),1,0), "Manufacturer", IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Seller__c),1,0), "Other", IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Seller__c),1,0), 0)==1))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose a Seller Type and select the appropriate seller for the selected Seller Type.
